name: Property tax timeline
currentStageRule: Stages are active when the current month/day falls inside a stage range. Overlapping ranges can activate more than one stage at the same time.

stages.label: Assessment
stages.description: Assessment stage. Property value is established for the assessment year.

stages.label: Protest
stages.description: Property owners may file valuation protests during the June protest window.

stages.label: Review
stages.description: County Board of Equalization review period. This overlaps the June protest stage.

stages.label: Budgets
stages.description: Taxing entities prepare and finalize budget needs.

stages.label: Levies
stages.description: Certified levies are set against taxable value.

stages.label: Final tax bills
stages.description: Final tax bills are issued after values, budgets, levies, credits, and exemptions are applied.
